evals.prompt: I run a Shopify store with 80K monthly visitors. Is Retention.com worth it for abandoned cart recovery?
evals.expected_output: ROI analysis with realistic match rates, setup guidance, and deliverability warnings

assertions.name: realistic_match_rate
assertions.description: Uses a conservative match rate estimate (15-25%) rather than the claimed 35% when calculating expected identifications

assertions.name: reclaim_first
assertions.description: Recommends starting with Reclaim (abandonment recovery) as the higher-ROI product before trying Grow (list building)

assertions.name: deliverability_warning
assertions.description: Warns about higher spam complaint rates from identified contacts and suggests protective measures like a separate sending domain

assertions.name: pricing_context
assertions.description: Mentions the pricing range and that annual contracts are required with no free trial

evals.prompt: My Klaviyo deliverability dropped after I turned on Retention.com. Spam complaints are at 0.2%. What do I do?
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis and recovery plan for deliverability issues caused by non-opted-in contacts

assertions.name: root_cause
assertions.description: Identifies that identified contacts didn't opt in and generate higher spam complaint rates than organic subscribers

assertions.name: separate_domain
assertions.description: Recommends using a separate sending subdomain to isolate reputation damage

assertions.name: segmentation
assertions.description: Advises restricting emails to high-intent segments only (cart abandoners, repeat visitors) rather than all identified contacts

assertions.name: sunset_policy
assertions.description: Suggests a faster sunset/removal policy for non-engaging contacts compared to organic list cadence

evals.prompt: What's the difference between Retention.com and RB2B? My friend recommended both.
evals.expected_output: Clear comparison showing B2C vs B2B use cases with the same founder context

assertions.name: b2c_vs_b2b
assertions.description: Explains that Retention.com is for B2C ecommerce while RB2B is for B2B sales teams

assertions.name: same_founder
assertions.description: Notes that both are founded by Adam Robinson but are separate products

assertions.name: use_case_guidance
assertions.description: Provides clear guidance on which to use based on whether the user's business is B2C or B2B

assertions.name: key_differences
assertions.description: Highlights at least one practical difference beyond market focus (e.g., pricing model, contract terms, or identification approach)
